examples: He hadn't eaten a thing except for one forkful of salad.
Every forkful has the perfect amount of ingredients.
She looked at him askance and took a forkful of food from his plate.
Creamy lemon curd enriches each forkful, brightening the vegetables' flavor and the plate's overall color scheme, while the ruddy quinoa grains provide earthy ballast.
With a forkful of the apple cake or apfelkuchen, as Berliners would have it, one is a time traveller back in the city's heady days of the late 1920s.
